title: Fig. 1 5.   Arrange these sections
subject: Mathematics
objective: To obtain a formula for the curved surface area of a right circular   cylinder
procedure:
1.   Take a rectangular chart paper of length   l   units and breadth   b   units
[see Fig. 1].
2.   Fold this paper along its breadth and join the two ends by using
cellotape and obtain a solid as shown in Fig. 2.
Fig. 1   Fig. 2
observation: 1.   The solid obtained is a cylinder.
discussion:
This activity is useful in finding the volumes and capacities of various
cylindrical objects/containers.
266 Laboratory Manual – Elementary Stage
